parts: Vibexia sericea has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The roots of Vibexia sericea contain alkaloids, including sericine and sericine A, which have been shown to have antimicrobial properties. The leaves contain flavonoids, including vitexin and isovitexin, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
